ground_truth.title: Insiders' Insights: Consulting Versus Insurance | SOA
with: Four actuaries with experience in both consulting firm and insurance company provide an in-depth look at both options, covering issues such as differences in the day-to-day activities, work culture, work-life-balance, rotation programs, etc.
They also share their personal career stories and advice on how to choose between insurance and consulting and how to transition from one to the other.
This page provides career guidance for actuaries considering different professional paths.
The content covers comparisons between consulting and insurance company environments.
Professional insights are shared by actuaries with experience in both sectors.
